hero.headline: The finest version|of you,|with surgical precision.
hero.subhead: Premium template for [CLINIC_NAME] in Puerta de Hierro. Discreet care, natural results, institutional-grade safety.

about.title: Facial and body surgery guided by high-specialty aesthetic judgment.
paragraphs: Dr. [NAME] combines advanced surgical technique with individualized planning for realistic, harmonious outcomes.
Every [CLINIC_NAME] protocol prioritizes safety, ethics and close follow-up from initial consultation through full recovery.
about.quote: Excellent aesthetic surgery does not change who you are; it reveals who you have always been.

procedures.title: Procedures designed for sophisticated, natural-looking outcomes.
procedures.subtitle: Facial and body options tailored to each patient's anatomy and goals.

items.name: Rhinoplasty
items.description: Functional and aesthetic refinement to improve proportion, breathing and facial balance.

items.name: Blepharoplasty
items.description: Eye contour rejuvenation for a rested, precise and refreshed expression.

items.name: Facelift
items.description: Tissue repositioning to restore firmness and definition while preserving natural identity.

items.name: Liposuction
items.description: Selective body sculpting to refine silhouette transitions with controlled precision.

items.name: Breast Augmentation
items.description: Customized projection and volume planning based on anatomy and aesthetic intent.

items.name: Abdominoplasty
items.description: Abdominal tightening with contour restoration and core support improvement.

items.name: Otoplasty
items.description: Conservative ear reshaping to harmonize form and position.

items.name: Mentoplasty
items.description: Chin definition designed to balance lower facial proportions.

whyUs.title: Clinical confidence at every stage of care.

items.label: International Certification
items.copy: Protocols aligned with global standards in surgical safety and ethical practice.

items.label: Advanced Technology
items.copy: Planning, operating room and recovery supported by contemporary surgical systems.

items.label: Personalized Care
items.copy: Dedicated one-to-one guidance before, during and after each procedure.

items.label: Natural Results
items.copy: Realistic goals that preserve facial and body identity with refined enhancement.

testimonials.title: Real experiences from local and international patients.
